ques: Find a beginner-level online course about '3d printing' which lasts 1-3 months, and is provided by a renowned university.
Search for a beginner-level online course about Python programming, suitable for someone who has no programming experience on Coursera.
Find a Beginner's Spanish Specialization on Coursera and show all the courses in this Specialization.
Identify a new course or Specialization on Coursera related to Python Data Science, sort the courses by newest, what the first course is and which institution offers it.
Identify a course or Specialization on Coursera that helps business process management with with a rating 4.7.
Identify a Specialization on Coursera that teaches C++ programming for beginners, provide the name and what the learning outcomes are.
Identify a course on Coursera related to 'Artificial Intelligence for Healthcare' and note the course duration along with the number of quizzes in Assessments.

Find a course on Coursera that teaches Reinforcement Learning for Intermediate with a rating of at least 4.5. Provide the name of the course, the institution offering it, and the number of reviews it has received.
Find a free course related to 'R for Data Science' available on Coursera. Scroll to find a course with the Free tag. What language the course is taught in?
Identify a Coursera course on artificial intelligence ethics that has a duration of less than 20 hours to complete and has been rated 4+ stars by participants.
Locate an introductory course related to artificial intelligence on Coursera, ensuring it's suitable for beginners and contains at least one module discussing Ethical Considerations.
Search for a Specialization on Coursera about project management that is produced by a university, show a testimonial for this Specialization.
Look for a Coursera course (not Specialization) that teaches Java programming basics.
Look for a Specialization on Coursera that teaches Python programming, and identify the skills you will learn by taking this Specialization.
Find a course on Coursera related to Introductory Project Management that includes modules on Agile methodology.
Find a course on Coursera named 'Introduction to Mathematical Thinking' offered by Stanford, what is the percentage (rounded) of 5 star ratings in reviews and which level has the least percentage?.
Identify a course on Coursera named 'Introduction to Finance: The Basics', who is the course instructor and what other courses does he/she teach.
How many results are there for a search on Coursera for Machine Learning, then filtered by Credit Eligible and 1-4 Years duration?
Identify a Coursera course that teaches JavaScript, which is beginner-friendly and includes a certificate upon completion.
Identify a course on Coursera that provides an introduction to Psychology, list the instructor's name, the institution offering it, and how many hours it will approximately take to complete.

Find an Intermediate-level online course on Coursera about 'Blockchain Technology' which lasts between 1 to 4 weeks, and is provided by a well-known institution. Also, note the course's main goals and the instructor's name.

Search for an online course on Coursera about 'Digital Marketing', suitable for beginner-level learners. Specify the course duration, the main learning outcomes, and the institution offering the course.
Identify a Specialization on Coursera that focuses on 'Human Resource', list the courses included in this Specialization, and the institution offering it.
Find a course on Coursera about 'Artificial Intelligence Ethics', which has a duration of less than 5 weeks and has been rated 4.5 stars or higher. Provide the course name and the instructor's name.

Locate an online course on Coursera related to 'Sustainability' that belongs to Physical Science and Engineering subject. The course should include a module on Measuring Sustainability. Note the course duration and the offering institution.
Find a course on Coursera about 'Relativity' for beginners. List the course's main topics and the estimated time (in hours) required to complete it.

Identify a Specialization on Coursera that offers an overview of 'Renewable Energy'. The Specialization should be beginner-level and include a course on Renewable Energy Futures. Note the instructor's name and the number of weeks required to complete the course if I spend 5 hours a week.

Search for a Specialization on Coursera about 'Data Visualization' that includes a project. Provide the name of the Specialization, the institution offering it, and the skills that will be developed by completing it.
Locate a Coursera Guided project related to 'Astrophysics' suitable for advanced learners. Mention the course duration, the institution offering it, and the main subjects covered in the course.
Browse the Coursera website and find the price required for one year of Coursera Plus. How much is the discount? Then list 3 companies that work with Coursera.

Locate the course 'Modern Art & Ideas' on Coursera offered by The Museum of Modern Art. Find out the percentage (rounded) of 3-star ratings in the reviews and note which star level has the lowest percentage.
Search for the course 'Exploring Quantum Physics' on Coursera, offered by the University of Maryland, College Park. Identify the percentage (rounded) of 5-star ratings in the reviews.

Search for 'Data Analysis' courses on Coursera. Apply filters to find courses that are 'Beginner Level' and have a duration ranging from 1 to 3 months. Determine the total count of courses that match these specifications.
Find a beginner level Coursera course related to "Internet of Things (IoT)" with a high rating. Provide the course name, instructor's name, and a brief summary of the skills that will be taught.
Find the course on Coursera named 'Essentials of Global Health'. Determine the instructor of this course and summarize his bio, note if there are any additional courses he offers on Coursera.
Find a Coursera course on Sustainable Agriculture practices, and detail the course's objectives and the background of the lead instructor.
Browse Coursera, which universities offer Master of Advanced Study in Engineering degrees? Tell me what is the latest application deadline for this degree?
Browse the Coursera homepage and list at least three free courses.
Browse Coursera, which universities and companies from Australia are partners of Coursera? List all of them.
Find the Space Safety course offered by TUM on Coursera. How many videos are there in module 2? What is the name of each video?
Browse Coursera for Business and Coursera for Teams and summarise some of their advantages.
Browse online degrees section on Coursera and list 3 Bachelor's degree programmes.
Search Coursera for courses about 'cybersecurity' and sort the results by Highest Rating. What is the name of the highest-rated cybersecurity course shown?
Find a Coursera course about 'Excel' suitable for absolute beginners. List the institution and the duration in hours.
Search Coursera for 'SQL for Data Analysis' courses and identify a Beginner-level course with at least 4.6 stars. Note the partner and the rating.
Find a Coursera course about 'TensorFlow' for Intermediate learners. Provide the course name and the offering institution.
Find a Coursera Specialization about 'Cloud Computing' and list the four courses included in the Specialization.
Search Coursera for 'UX Design' Professional Certificates. Identify the partner behind the most popular one and its duration.
Find a Beginner-level Coursera course about 'Statistics' offered by a US university. Note the instructor's name.
Search Coursera for 'Negotiation' courses. Identify a Beginner-level course rated 4.7 or higher and note its skills.
Look up Coursera courses about 'Product Management'. Find a Specialization with a project component and list the included courses.
Find a Beginner Coursera course about 'Public Speaking' that lasts less than 10 hours. Note the partner and rating.
Search Coursera for 'Game Development' courses and identify a Beginner-level course. Provide the institution and the skills you will learn.
Find a Coursera Specialization about 'Music Production'. Identify the offering institution and the four sub-courses.
On Coursera, apply the filters 'Beginner' and 'Less Than 2 Hours' to the search results. List the total number of courses that match and provide three example course names.
Search Coursera for 'Python' courses, then filter by 'Guided Project'. Identify a project that can be finished in under 2 hours and note its skills.
On Coursera, filter for 'Intermediate' level courses in 'Data Science' lasting 1-3 months. How many results are shown? Name one of them.
Search Coursera for courses with the 'Free' filter applied. Identify a free course from Yale University and note its duration.
Filter Coursera for 'Specialization' course type and 'Beginner' level. Pick one Specialization in Business and list its courses.
On Coursera, find a 'Professional Certificate' that is Beginner level and lasts 6+ months. Note the partner and the credentials issued.
Filter Coursera search for 'Credit Eligible' courses in 'Data Science'. Identify one university-issued program eligible for college credit and note the credit details.
Search Coursera for 'Marketing' and filter by 'English' language. List three results and the partner for each.
On Coursera, search for 'Java' and filter to courses lasting between 1 and 3 months. How many results are returned?
Apply the 'Free' filter on Coursera while searching 'Health'. Name three free health courses and the partners offering them.
Find a Coursera course in 'Arts and Humanities' filtered to 'Beginner' and 'Less Than 2 Hours'. Note the title and instructor.
Search Coursera for 'Leadership' and filter by 'Specialization' type. Identify one Specialization and list the included courses.
On Coursera, filter to 'Guided Project' courses about 'Excel'. Provide the names of two example projects.
Use the duration filter '6+ Months' on Coursera and a search for 'Data'. Identify one Professional Certificate that matches and note its partner.
Filter Coursera for 'Advanced' level courses in 'Computer Science'. Pick one course and summarise its prerequisites and the partner offering it.
On Coursera, log in as alice.j@test.com (password TestPass123!), open 'Python for Everybody', and enroll in it. Confirm that the course now appears on your Account / Enrollments page.

Log in to Coursera as bob.c@test.com (TestPass123!), open 'HTML, CSS, and Javascript for Web Developers' and click Enroll. After enrolling, navigate to your Account page and confirm the course is listed.
Sign up for a new Coursera account, enroll in 'AI For Everyone', then go to your Account to verify it appears under your enrollments.
As carol.d@test.com (TestPass123!), enroll in 'Introduction to Project Management' on Coursera. Then open your Account page and report the progress shown for this course.
Log in as david.k@test.com (TestPass123!), enroll in 'Machine Learning Specialization' and 'Deep Learning Specialization'. Confirm both appear under your Coursera enrollments.
Create a new Coursera account, then enroll in two different courses of your choice. Verify both appear in your Account page.
Log in to Coursera as alice.j@test.com (TestPass123!). Find a Beginner Python course you are NOT yet enrolled in and enroll. Then visit Account and count how many enrollments you now have.
Sign up for a Coursera account and enroll in any free course offered by Yale University. Confirm the course shows in your Account page.
Log in as bob.c@test.com (TestPass123!) on Coursera, search for 'JavaScript', enroll in any matching course, and confirm the enrollment under Account.
Sign up for a Coursera account, then enroll in 'The Science of Well-Being' from Yale. Verify the enrolment appears on your Account dashboard.
Log in to Coursera as alice.j@test.com (TestPass123!). Open the course 'AI For Everyone' and add it to your saved courses. Then visit your Wishlist and confirm it is listed.
On Coursera, sign up for a new account, save three different courses to your Wishlist, then visit the Wishlist page and list the three saved courses.
Log in as bob.c@test.com (TestPass123!) on Coursera. Open 'Python for Everybody', save it to your list, then go to the Wishlist page and remove it. Confirm the Wishlist is empty (for that course).
Log in as carol.d@test.com (TestPass123!), open 'Fundamentals of Digital Marketing' and add it to saved courses. Confirm via the Wishlist page that it appears.
As david.k@test.com (TestPass123!), save 'Reinforcement Learning Specialization' to your list, then navigate to Wishlist and confirm.
Sign up for Coursera, save 'AI For Everyone' to your Wishlist, then remove it and confirm the Wishlist is empty.
Log in to Coursera as alice.j@test.com (TestPass123!). Add three Python-related courses to your Wishlist. Then remove the first one. Confirm exactly two remain.
Log in as bob.c@test.com (TestPass123!), open a Specialization in Web Development, save it, and confirm it appears under Wishlist alongside any previously saved courses.
As carol.d@test.com (TestPass123!), open the saved-courses page (Wishlist) on Coursera. List every saved course and identify which has the highest rating.
Log in as david.k@test.com (TestPass123!), open the Wishlist page on Coursera and report how many saved courses you currently have.
On Coursera, find the instructor 'Andrew Ng'. List the courses or specializations he teaches and note his current affiliation.
Find the Coursera profile page for the instructor 'Charles Severance'. List the courses he teaches and the institution he is affiliated with.
Search Coursera for courses by 'Paul Bloom' from Yale. Provide the list of courses he teaches.
Find the Coursera courses taught by 'Bina Ramamurthy'. Provide their names and the offering institution.
On Coursera, identify all courses taught by 'Gautam Kaul' and the institution he is affiliated with.
Find the Coursera instructor 'Roger D. Peng'. List every course he teaches and his current affiliation.
On Coursera, find the instructor 'Margaret Tan'. Provide the institution she works at and list the courses she teaches.
Search Coursera for courses taught by 'Idil Akin'. List her courses and her institutional affiliation.
Open the Coursera course 'Sustainability and Development' and list the titles of all modules. Identify which module contains 'Measuring Sustainability'.
Open the Coursera course 'Space Safety' (TUM). For module 4, list the number of videos, readings, and quizzes.
On Coursera, open 'Python for Everybody' and report the total number of modules and quizzes across the entire course.
Open the Coursera course 'AI For Everyone'. Count the total number of quizzes across all modules and report it.
On Coursera, identify a Professional Certificate that includes a final Capstone module. Provide the certificate name and the capstone module title.
Open the Coursera course 'Introduction to Mathematical Thinking' and list the titles of every module in order.
On Coursera, find a course where module 1 is titled 'Foundations' or starts with the word 'Foundations'. Provide the course title and the partner.
Open the Coursera course 'Modern Art & Ideas' and list the videos in module 1 along with the total readings count for that module.
On Coursera, open the Partners page and list every partner from Germany.
Open the Coursera Partners page and filter by 'company'. List every company partner.
On Coursera, count how many university partners are listed in the United Kingdom.
From the Coursera Partners page, list every partner from Singapore and their type (university or company).
Open the Coursera Partners page filtered by country=Australia. Compare the total number of universities versus companies.
Browse Coursera and identify three Professional Certificates issued by Google. Note the duration of each.
On Coursera, open the Browse page for 'Data Science' and list six courses shown.
Open the Coursera browse page for 'Health' and list five featured courses and the offering institutions.
Open the Coursera course 'Machine Learning Specialization'. Read the testimonials shown on the page and quote one from a learner named 'Sofia Rossi' if present.
Open the Coursera course 'Python for Data Science, AI & Development'. Find one testimonial on the page and report the learner's name, role, and date.
On Coursera, find a course where a learner left a 4.0-star or lower review. Quote the review body and the learner name.
Open the Coursera course 'Introduction to Psychology' and report the percentage of 5-star reviews shown.
Open 'Reinforcement Learning Specialization' on Coursera and list the three testimonials shown on the page.
On Coursera, identify a Specialization whose ratings include at least one 4.0-star review. Report the Specialization name and the review body.
On Coursera, open the Online Degrees page and list every Master of Advanced Study in Engineering program along with its application deadline.
Browse Coursera's online degrees. Identify a Bachelor of Science degree in Data Science and report the offering university plus the duration.
On Coursera, identify a Bachelor's degree available entirely online. Note the degree title, the institution, and whether it is credit-eligible.
Browse the Coursera Professional Certificates page and list three Professional Certificates issued by Meta or Google.
Find a Coursera Professional Certificate in Data Science. Provide the partner, the duration, and the main skills it teaches.
Browse the Coursera Degrees page filtered by type=Master. List three Master's programs and the offering institutions.
On Coursera, find the Master of Advanced Study in Engineering Management. Note the application deadline and the offering institution.
Open a Coursera Professional Certificate of your choice. Report the duration in months, the number of modules, and the partner.
On Coursera, open the Coursera Plus page. Report the annual price and the monthly price shown.
Browse the Coursera Plus page and list four benefits of subscribing.
Open the Coursera for Business page. List four reasons Coursera recommends Coursera for Business and the partners highlighted.
On the Coursera for Teams page, list four benefits of upgrading to Coursera for Teams.
Visit the Coursera for Government page and list four reasons Coursera highlights for public-sector buyers.
Open the Coursera for Campus (For Universities) page and list four benefits universities receive from partnering with Coursera.
On the Coursera Help Center, find the answer to 'How do I receive my certificate?' and summarise it in one sentence.
Open the Coursera Help Center. List three topics covered under 'Payments and refunds'.
Visit the Coursera mobile app page and list four features highlighted for the mobile app.
On the Coursera blog, list the titles of the three most recent posts and their categories.
Open the Coursera blog post titled 'Top 10 Skills Employers Will Look For in 2026' and summarise the key takeaway.
Visit the Coursera Careers page and list three open roles in Engineering.
On the Coursera Careers page, list four benefits Coursera offers to full-time employees.
On the Coursera Help Center, find how to delete your Coursera account. Provide the exact steps.
Open the Coursera blog post about Professional Certificate ROI and report the headline of the article.
From the Coursera Help Center, find the financial-aid section and report how many business days approvals typically take.
On Coursera, search for 'data analysis', filter to Beginner level and 1-3 months duration. Of the matching courses, identify the one with the highest enrolment count and note its partner.

Log in to Coursera as alice.j@test.com (TestPass123!). Search for 'Generative AI', enroll in a Beginner-level course, then add a different Generative AI course to your saved list. Confirm both actions on your Account and Wishlist pages.
On Coursera, search for 'Python' and sort by Newest. Open the first result and report the partner, instructor, and the publication date shown.
Browse Coursera and find a Specialization on 'Machine Learning' that is Credit Eligible. Report the Specialization name, partner, and the courses it bundles.
On Coursera, find a Professional Certificate that is free for the first 7 days, takes 3-6 months, and is in Information Technology. Report the partner.

Log in as bob.c@test.com (TestPass123!) on Coursera, enroll in any Java Specialization, save any React-related course to your Wishlist, then visit your Account and Wishlist pages and confirm both items appear.
Search Coursera for 'Cybersecurity Professional Certificate'. Identify the partner, the duration, and the four key skills it teaches.
Browse Coursera for Online Degrees, then open the iMBA program. Report the offering university, the duration, and whether it is credit eligible.
On Coursera, identify a Guided Project that takes under 2 hours, in the Business category. Report the partner, the title, and the skills taught.
Search Coursera for 'Andrew Ng', then open his instructor page. List every course or specialization he teaches and the sum of their total enrolled learners.
On Coursera, open the Modern Art & Ideas course and the Sustainability and Development course. Compare their durations and offering institutions in one sentence.
Log in as carol.d@test.com (TestPass123!), visit your Wishlist, remove every saved course in turn, then confirm your Wishlist is empty.
On Coursera, find a Spanish-language Specialization aimed at Beginners. Provide the Specialization name, the partner, and the four sub-courses.
Search Coursera for courses taught in French. Identify a Business-related course in French and note the offering institution.
On Coursera, find a Beginner Specialization in Chinese language learning. Provide the partner and the included courses.
Search Coursera for 'Spanish' Specializations. Compare two different Beginner Spanish Specializations and note the difference in number of sub-courses.
Find a Coursera Professional Certificate that prepares non-English speakers for working in tech. Provide the partner and the duration.
